description: Displays the counting formula for a sample space, permutation, combination, or multinomial as a KaTeX-rendered expression. Supports symbolic notation (P(n,r), C(n,r), M(n;...), |S|) or expanded factorial form.
utility: Display counting formula for a sample space or arrangement

arguments.name: source
arguments.description: Reference to a sample space, permutation, combination, or multinomial variable

arguments.name: format
arguments.description: Display format: symbolic (P(n,r), default) or substituted (expanded factorial form)

examples.expression:
P = permutation(set("A","B","C","D","E"), choose(3), at(4,10), view(14,12))
countingrule(P, at(18,10))

C = combination(set("A","B","C","D"), choose(2), at(4,10), view(10,8))
countingrule(C, at(14,10))

M = multinomial(group("R",3), group("B",2), at(4,10), view(12,10))
countingrule(M, at(16,10))

S = sspace(dice(2), at(4,10), view(12,12))
countingrule(S, at(16,10))
